reason: Backend hard rules: AGPL SPDX, _Strict Pydantic, camelCase state schemas, atomic writes, no LangChain outside agents, UTC timestamps
Workspace layout, accessor discipline, page section skeletons for wiki API endpoints
Domain error types for API endpoints, validate-at-boundary pattern
Frontend stack pinning: React 19, Vite 6, TanStack Router/Query, shadcn, Tailwind 4, AGPL SPDX headers
Radix wrappers, CVA variants, data-slot, lucide icons for new wiki browser components
TanStack Query for server state, no global store — pattern for wiki data fetching
Strict TS, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, types/api.ts as Pydantic mirror for new API types
Context-provider pairs, TanStack Query query patterns for wiki data hooks
